personal.name: Sandeep Kumar
personal.title: Cybersecurity Enthusiast
personal.bio: I am a passionate Cybersecurity student with a strong interest in ethical hacking, network security, and threat analysis. I enjoy learning how systems work and identifying vulnerabilities to improve security. I am building hands-on projects using tools like Nmap, Wireshark, and Linux to strengthen my practical skills. My goal is to start my career as a Security Analyst.
personal.shortIntro: Aspiring Security Analyst focused on ethical hacking and network security

skills.title: Network Security
skills.description: Network scanning, packet analysis, firewall configuration, IDS/IPS basics

skills.title: Security Tools
skills.description: Nmap, Wireshark, Burp Suite, Metasploit, John the Ripper

skills.title: Linux & System Admin
skills.description: Kali Linux, command line, system hardening, log analysis

skills.title: Threat Analysis
skills.description: Vulnerability assessment, risk analysis, OWASP Top 10

skills.title: Web Application Security
skills.description: XSS, SQL Injection, CSRF, security headers, secure coding

projects.title: PhishGuard Email Scanner
projects.description: An intelligent email security tool that scans message content for phishing indicators, evaluates risk signals, and flags potentially malicious emails before users interact with them.

projects.title: Password Strength Checker
projects.description: Security-focused password checker that validates password strength using rules and pattern checks, with practical feedback for stronger credentials.

projects.title: ATM Machine System
projects.description: ATM machine simulation built with Python and Flask featuring account login, withdrawal, deposit, balance enquiry, and transaction flow handling.

projects.title: Library Management System
projects.description: Library management web app using Python and Flask for book cataloging, member tracking, issue-return operations, and basic admin workflows.

ctfProfiles.description: Completed Pre Security, Introduction to Cyber Security, and Linux Fundamentals paths
Active learner solving beginner-level machines and challenges
